1696600.name: JUMANJI The Curse Returns - Season Pass
1696600.description:
The Season Pass bundle contains:

FREE in-game for a limited time only - JUMANJI: Welcome to the Jungle Expansion
You’ve watched the movie, now rise up and become the movie heroes: Dr. Smolder Bravestone, Mouse Finbar, Prof. Shelly Oberon and Ruby Roundhouse! In this latest official game your “lives” are shared, so working together is even more important! Discover a brand new map, battle new dangers, restore the Jaguar’s Eye and save Jumanji!

3 Exclusive tokens
Play as the Hippo, Snake or Zebra.

Winter Resort Map
Bringing a tropical jungle into a winter resort is going to really mess with the environment! Watch out, the magic of Jumanji will never freeze!
1696600.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
